info.name: YT Backend API Documentation
info.description:
# YT Backend API Documentation

A production-ready REST API for a personal finance tracker — **YT Backend**. This API enables users to register, authenticate, manage financial records (income/expenses), and view dashboard analytics.

---

## Base URL

```
{{base_url}}
```

 Set `base_url` to `https://zorvyn-assigment-ly09.onrender.com` for the live API Set `base_url` to `http://localhost:3000` for local development.

---

## Authentication

This API uses **JWT Bearer token authentication**. After a successful login, the server returns a JWT token in the response body. All protected routes require this token in the `Authorization` header.

**Login flow:**
1. `POST /api/auth/register` — Create a new account
2. `POST /api/auth/login` — Receive JWT token in response body
3. Set `Authorization: Bearer {{jwt_token}}` header on all subsequent requests

Set the `jwt_token` environment variable to your JWT after login.

---

## Roles & Access Control

| Role | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `admin` | Full access. Can view all users, update roles and statuses. |
| `analyst` | Read-only access to analytics and records. |
| `viewer` | Basic read-only access. |

---

## Global Variables

| Variable | Description | Example |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| `base_url` | Base URL of the API server | `http://localhost:3000` |
| `jwt_token` | JWT token received after login | *(set after login)* |

---

## Folders

| Folder | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Auth** | Registration, login, logout, and current user endpoints |
| **Users** | Admin-only user management endpoints |
| **Records** | CRUD operations for financial records (income/expenses) |
| **Dashboard** | Analytics: summary, categories, trends, and recent activity |

---

## Common Response Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| `200` | OK — Request succeeded |
| `201` | Created — Resource successfully created |
| `400` | Bad Request — Validation error or missing fields |
| `401` | Unauthorized — Missing or invalid JWT token |
| `403` | Forbidden — Insufficient permissions for this role |
| `500` | Internal Server Error — Unexpected server failure |

---

## Endpoint Reference

### Auth
| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `POST` | `/api/auth/register` | Register a new user |
| `POST` | `/api/auth/login` | Login and receive JWT cookie |
| `GET` | `/api/auth/me` | Get currently authenticated user |
| `POST` | `/api/auth/logout` | Logout and clear JWT cookie |

### Users *(Admin only)*
| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/users/users` | Get all users |
| `GET` | `/api/users/user/:userId` | Get user by ID |
| `PATCH` | `/api/users/user/:userId/role` | Update user role |
| `PATCH` | `/api/users/user/:userId/status` | Update user active status |

### Records
| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/records` | Get all records for authenticated user |
| `POST` | `/api/records` | Create a new financial record |
| `GET` | `/api/records/:recordId` | Get a specific record by ID |
| `PUT` | `/api/records/:recordId` | Update a specific record |
| `DELETE` | `/api/records/:recordId` | Soft delete a record (Admin only) |

### Dashboard
| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/dashboard/summary` | Get financial summary (income, expense, balance) |
| `GET` | `/api/dashboard/categories` | Get spending breakdown by category |
| `GET` | `/api/dashboard/trends/monthly` | Get monthly income/expense trends |
| `GET` | `/api/dashboard/trends/weekly` | Get weekly income/expense trends |
| `GET` | `/api/dashboard/recent` | Get most recent financial records |

item.name: Auth

request.description:
## Register User

Creates a new user account in the system.

**Access:** Public (no authentication required)

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| name | string | Yes | Full name of the user |
| email | string | Yes | Valid email address (must be unique) |
| password | string | Yes | Minimum 8 characters, must include uppercase, number, and special character |

### Notes
- Email must be unique across the system
- Password is hashed before storage (bcrypt)
- On success, the user is created with the default role: `viewer`

### Response Examples

**201 Created**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User registered successfully",
  "data": {
    "_id": "69cd709ef6d0d02290c9de6e",
    "name": "Suraj Sharma",
    "email": "suraj.sharma@example.com",
    "role": "viewer",
    "status": "active",
    "createdAt": "2026-04-04T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

**400 Bad Request** – Validation error
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Validation failed",
  "errors": [
    { "field": "email", "message": "Email already in use" },
    { "field": "password", "message": "Password must be at least 8 characters" }
  ]
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 400 Bad Request – Validation Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Validation failed", "errors": [{"field": "email", "message": "Email already in use"}, {"field": "password", "message": "Password must be at least 8 characters"}]}

response.name: 500 Internal Server Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."}

request.description:
## Login

Authenticates a user with email and password. On success, a signed JWT is issued and stored in an HTTP-only cookie named `token`.

**Access:** Public (no authentication required)

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| email | string | Yes | Registered email address |
| password | string | Yes | Account password |

### Notes
- JWT is returned in the response body as `token`. Use it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header
- Cookie expiry: 7 days
- Use this token for all subsequent authenticated requests

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Login successful",
  "data": {
    "_id": "69cd709ef6d0d02290c9de6e",
    "name": "Suraj Sharma",
    "email": "suraj.sharma@example.com",
    "role": "admin"
  }
}
```

**400 Bad Request** – Missing fields
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Email and password are required"
}
```

**401 Unauthorized** – Invalid credentials
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Invalid email or password"
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 500 Internal Server Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."}

request.description:
## Get Authenticated User

Retrieves the profile of a specific user by their ID. Typically used to fetch the currently logged-in user's details after login.

**Access:** Admin, Analyst, Viewer (authenticated users only — users can only fetch their own profile unless Admin)

### Path Variables
| Variable | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| userId | string | Yes | MongoDB ObjectId of the user (e.g., `69cd709ef6d0d02290c9de6e`) |

### Notes
- Requires a valid JWT Bearer token in the Authorization header
- Non-admin users can only access their own profile

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "69cd709ef6d0d02290c9de6e",
    "name": "Suraj Sharma",
    "email": "suraj.sharma@example.com",
    "role": "admin",
    "status": "active",
    "createdAt": "2026-04-04T10:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-04-04T12:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

**401 Unauthorized** – Missing or invalid token
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Authentication required. Please log in."
}
```

**403 Forbidden** – Accessing another user's profile without Admin role
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Access denied. You can only view your own profile."
}
```

**404 Not Found**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "User not found"
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 403 Forbidden – Access Denied
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Access denied. You can only view your own profile."}

response.name: 500 Internal Server Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."}

item.description: Endpoints for user authentication. Handles registration, login, logout, and fetching the authenticated user's profile. JWT is issued on login and stored in an HTTP-only cookie.

item.name: Users

request.description:
## Get All Users

Returns a paginated list of all registered users in the system.

**Access:** Admin only

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| page | number | No | 1 | Page number for pagination |
| limit | number | No | 10 | Number of results per page |
| role | string | No | — | Filter by role: `admin`, `analyst`, `viewer` |
| status | string | No | — | Filter by status: `active`, `inactive` |

### Notes
- Requires Admin role
- Returns paginated results with metadata

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "users": [
      {
        "_id": "69cd709ef6d0d02290c9de6e",
        "name": "Suraj Sharma",
        "email": "suraj.sharma@example.com",
        "role": "admin",
        "status": "active",
        "createdAt": "2026-04-04T10:00:00.000Z"
      },
      {
        "_id": "69ce1b3e09f4a12390c9ab1f",
        "name": "Priya Mehta",
        "email": "priya.mehta@example.com",
        "role": "analyst",
        "status": "active",
        "createdAt": "2026-04-03T08:30:00.000Z"
      }
    ],
    "pagination": {
      "total": 24,
      "page": 1,
      "limit": 10,
      "totalPages": 3
    }
  }
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Authentication required. Please log in."
}
```

**403 Forbidden** – Non-admin access
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Access denied. Admin role required."
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 500 Internal Server Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."}

request.description:
## Update User Role

Updates the role of a specific user. Only Admins can change user roles.

**Access:** Admin only

### Path Variables
| Variable | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| userId | string | Yes | MongoDB ObjectId of the target user |

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| role | string | Yes | New role to assign. Allowed values: `admin`, `analyst`, `viewer` |

### Notes
- An Admin cannot downgrade their own role
- Role change takes effect immediately on next request

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User role updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "_id": "69ce1b3e09f4a12390c9ab1f",
    "name": "Priya Mehta",
    "email": "priya.mehta@example.com",
    "role": "analyst",
    "status": "active"
  }
}
```

**400 Bad Request** – Invalid role value
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Invalid role. Allowed values: admin, analyst, viewer"
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Authentication required. Please log in."
}
```

**403 Forbidden**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Access denied. Admin role required."
}
```

**404 Not Found**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "User not found"
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 400 Bad Request – Invalid Role
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Invalid role. Allowed values: admin, analyst, viewer"}

response.name: 500 Internal Server Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."}

request.description:
## Update User Status

Activates or deactivates a user account. Deactivated users cannot log in.

**Access:** Admin only

### Path Variables
| Variable | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| userId | string | Yes | MongoDB ObjectId of the target user |

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| status | string | Yes | New status. Allowed values: `active`, `inactive` |

### Notes
- Admins cannot deactivate their own account
- Inactive users receive a 403 on login attempts

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User status updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "_id": "69ce1b3e09f4a12390c9ab1f",
    "name": "Priya Mehta",
    "email": "priya.mehta@example.com",
    "role": "analyst",
    "status": "inactive"
  }
}
```

**400 Bad Request**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Invalid status. Allowed values: active, inactive"
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Authentication required. Please log in."
}
```

**403 Forbidden**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Access denied. Admin role required."
}
```

**404 Not Found**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "User not found"
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 400 Bad Request – Invalid Status
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Invalid status. Allowed values: active, inactive"}

response.name: 500 Internal Server Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."}

item.description: Endpoints for managing users. Admins can list all users, update a user's role, or activate/deactivate a user account. All endpoints require Admin role.

item.name: Records

request.description:
## Get All Records

Returns a paginated list of all records. Supports filtering by category and date range.

**Access:** Admin, Analyst, Viewer (all authenticated users)

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| page | number | No | 1 | Page number |
| limit | number | No | 10 | Results per page |
| category | string | No | — | Filter by category (e.g., `income`, `expense`) |
| startDate | string | No | — | ISO 8601 date filter start (e.g., `2026-01-01`) |
| endDate | string | No | — | ISO 8601 date filter end (e.g., `2026-04-04`) |

### Notes
- Results are sorted by `createdAt` descending by default

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "records": [
      {
        "_id": "69ce74c8f1fd65f7789f5085",
        "title": "Monthly Salary",
        "amount": 75000,
        "category": "income",
        "description": "April salary credit",
        "date": "2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z",
        "createdBy": "69cd709ef6d0d02290c9de6e",
        "createdAt": "2026-04-04T10:00:00.000Z"
      }
    ],
    "pagination": {
      "total": 58,
      "page": 1,
      "limit": 10,
      "totalPages": 6
    }
  }
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Authentication required. Please log in."
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 500 Internal Server Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."}

request.description:
## Create Record

Creates a new financial record in the system.

**Access:** Admin, Analyst

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| title | string | Yes | Short title for the record (max 100 chars) |
| amount | number | Yes | Monetary amount (must be positive) |
| category | string | Yes | Category of the record: `income`, `expense`, `investment` |
| description | string | No | Optional detailed description (max 500 chars) |
| date | string | Yes | ISO 8601 date string (e.g., `2026-04-01`) |

### Notes
- Viewers cannot create records
- `createdBy` is automatically set to the authenticated user's ID

### Response Examples

**201 Created**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Record created successfully",
  "data": {
    "_id": "69ce74c8f1fd65f7789f5085",
    "title": "Monthly Salary",
    "amount": 75000,
    "category": "income",
    "description": "April 2026 salary credit from employer",
    "date": "2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    "createdBy": "69cd709ef6d0d02290c9de6e",
    "createdAt": "2026-04-04T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

**400 Bad Request**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Validation failed",
  "errors": [
    { "field": "amount", "message": "Amount must be a positive number" },
    { "field": "category", "message": "Invalid category. Allowed: income, expense, investment" }
  ]
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Authentication required. Please log in."
}
```

**403 Forbidden**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Access denied. Analyst or Admin role required."
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 201 Created – Record Created
response.body: {"success": true, "message": "Record created successfully", "data": {"_id": "69ce74c8f1fd65f7789f5085", "title": "Monthly Salary", "amount": 75000, "category": "income", "description": "April 2026 salary credit from employer", "date": "2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z", "createdBy": "69cd709ef6d0d02290c9de6e", "createdAt": "2026-04-04T10:00:00.000Z"}}

response.name: 400 Bad Request – Validation Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Validation failed", "errors": [{"field": "amount", "message": "Amount must be a positive number"}, {"field": "category", "message": "Invalid category. Allowed: income, expense, investment"}]}

response.name: 403 Forbidden – Viewer Cannot Create
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Access denied. Analyst or Admin role required."}

response.name: 500 Internal Server Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."}

request.description:
## Get Record by ID

Retrieves a single record by its unique ID.

**Access:** Admin, Analyst, Viewer (all authenticated users)

### Path Variables
| Variable | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| recordId | string | Yes | MongoDB ObjectId of the record (e.g., `69ce74c8f1fd65f7789f5085`) |

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "69ce74c8f1fd65f7789f5085",
    "title": "Monthly Salary",
    "amount": 75000,
    "category": "income",
    "description": "April 2026 salary credit from employer",
    "date": "2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    "createdBy": {
      "_id": "69cd709ef6d0d02290c9de6e",
      "name": "Suraj Sharma",
      "email": "suraj.sharma@example.com"
    },
    "createdAt": "2026-04-04T10:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-04-04T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Authentication required. Please log in."
}
```

**404 Not Found**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Record not found"
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 200 OK – Record Retrieved
response.body: {"success": true, "data": {"_id": "69ce74c8f1fd65f7789f5085", "title": "Monthly Salary", "amount": 75000, "category": "income", "description": "April 2026 salary credit from employer", "date": "2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z", "createdBy": {"_id": "69cd709ef6d0d02290c9de6e", "name": "Suraj Sharma", "email": "suraj.sharma@example.com"}, "createdAt": "2026-04-04T10:00:00.000Z", "updatedAt": "2026-04-04T10:00:00.000Z"}}

response.name: 500 Internal Server Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."}

request.description:
## Update Record

Updates an existing record by its ID. All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated.

**Access:** Admin, Analyst

### Path Variables
| Variable | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| recordId | string | Yes | MongoDB ObjectId of the record to update |

### Request Body (all fields optional)
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| title | string | Updated title (max 100 chars) |
| amount | number | Updated amount (must be positive) |
| category | string | Updated category: `income`, `expense`, `investment` |
| description | string | Updated description (max 500 chars) |
| date | string | Updated date in ISO 8601 format |

### Notes
- Viewers cannot update records
- `updatedAt` is automatically set on update

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Record updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "_id": "69ce74c8f1fd65f7789f5085",
    "title": "Monthly Salary - April 2026",
    "amount": 80000,
    "category": "income",
    "description": "Updated April 2026 salary after increment",
    "date": "2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-04-04T14:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

**400 Bad Request**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Validation failed",
  "errors": [
    { "field": "amount", "message": "Amount must be a positive number" }
  ]
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Authentication required. Please log in."
}
```

**403 Forbidden**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Access denied. Analyst or Admin role required."
}
```

**404 Not Found**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Record not found"
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 200 OK – Record Updated

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Monthly Salary - April 2026",
  "amount": 80000,
  "category": "income",
  "description": "Updated April 2026 salary after increment",
  "date": "2026-04-01"
}

response.body: {"success": true, "message": "Record updated successfully", "data": {"_id": "69ce74c8f1fd65f7789f5085", "title": "Monthly Salary - April 2026", "amount": 80000, "category": "income", "description": "Updated April 2026 salary after increment", "date": "2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z", "updatedAt": "2026-04-04T14:00:00.000Z"}}

response.name: 400 Bad Request – Validation Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Validation failed", "errors": [{"field": "amount", "message": "Amount must be a positive number"}]}

response.name: 403 Forbidden – Viewer Cannot Update
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Access denied. Analyst or Admin role required."}

response.name: 500 Internal Server Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."}

request.description:
## Delete Record

Soft deletes a financial record by its ID. The record is not permanently removed — it is marked as deleted and excluded from all future queries.

**Access:** Admin only

### Path Variables
| Variable | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|--------------|
| recordId | string | Yes | MongoDB ObjectId of the record to delete |

### Notes
- Only Admin can delete records
- Soft delete — sets `isDeleted: true`, record remains in the database
- Deleted records are automatically excluded from all GET queries via a Mongoose pre-hook
- Cannot be undone via the API (recovery requires direct DB access)

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Record deleted successfully"
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "No token provided, access denied"
}
```

**403 Forbidden** – Non-admin role
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Access denied. Required role: admin"
}
```

**404 Not Found**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Record not found"
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 500 Internal Server Error
response.body: {"success": false, "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."}

item.description: CRUD endpoints for managing records. Admins and Analysts can create and update records. All authenticated users can read records.

item.name: Dashboard

request.description:
## Get Dashboard Summary

Returns a high-level summary of key financial metrics for the dashboard overview panel.

**Access:** Admin, Analyst, Viewer (all authenticated users)

### Notes
- Data reflects the current state of all records in the system
- Amounts are in the system's default currency

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "totalRecords": 58,
    "totalIncome": 450000,
    "totalExpenses": 182000,
    "totalInvestments": 95000,
    "netBalance": 268000,
    "lastUpdated": "2026-04-04T18:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Authentication required. Please log in."
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

## Get Monthly Trends

Returns aggregated financial data grouped by month. Used to render line/bar charts showing income vs. expense trends over the year.

**Access:** Admin, Analyst, Viewer (all authenticated users)

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| year | number | No | Current year | Filter trends by year (e.g., `2026`) |

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "year": 2026,
    "trends": [
      { "month": "January", "income": 75000, "expense": 42000, "investment": 15000 },
      { "month": "February", "income": 75000, "expense": 38000, "investment": 20000 },
      { "month": "March", "income": 80000, "expense": 45000, "investment": 25000 },
      { "month": "April", "income": 80000, "expense": 35000, "investment": 20000 }
    ]
  }
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Authentication required. Please log in."
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

## Get Weekly Trends

Returns aggregated financial data grouped by week. Used to render short-term trend charts on the dashboard.

**Access:** Admin, Analyst, Viewer (all authenticated users)

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| week | number | No | Current week | ISO week number (1–53) |
| year | number | No | Current year | Year for the week filter |

### Response Examples

**200 OK**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "year": 2026,
    "week": 14,
    "trends": [
      { "day": "Monday", "income": 0, "expense": 5200, "investment": 0 },
      { "day": "Tuesday", "income": 0, "expense": 3100, "investment": 5000 },
      { "day": "Wednesday", "income": 80000, "expense": 1200, "investment": 0 },
      { "day": "Thursday", "income": 0, "expense": 8700, "investment": 0 },
      { "day": "Friday", "income": 0, "expense": 4300, "investment": 15000 }
    ]
  }
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Authentication required. Please log in."
}
```

**500 Internal Server Error**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Internal server error. Please try again later."
}
```

response.name: 200 OK – Recent Activity Retrieved

item.description: Read-only analytics endpoints for the dashboard. Returns summary metrics, category breakdowns, trend data (monthly/weekly), and recent activity. Accessible by Admin, Analyst, and Viewer roles.
